video-settings.name: Video Settings
video-settings.description: Settings related to the startup video and animation.

startup-image.name: Startup Video (Animated Webp)
startup-image.description: <cb>Animated Webp</c> file that plays <cr>when you start the game</c>. Paired with <cy>Startup Sound</c> to create somewhat of a <cr>v<co>i<cy>d<cg>e<cb>o <cm>p<cp>l<cr>a<co>y<cy>e<cg>r<cb>.</c>

startup-sound.name: Startup Sound (MP3)
startup-sound.description: Sound file that plays <cr>when you start the game</c>. Paired with <cy>Startup Video</c> to create somewhat of a <cr>v<co>i<cy>d<cg>e<cb>o <cm>p<cp>l<cr>a<co>y<cy>e<cg>r<cb>.</c>

vid-scale.name: Video scale
vid-scale.description: Scale of video. 1 is normal size, and 2 would be double ect.

loading-settings.name: Playback Settings
loading-settings.description: Settings related to when the video is played.

wait-until-load.description: Waits until the game is loaded to play the animation. It stays on the first frame of the uploaded video until the actual loading screen is done. Reduces video lag.
wait-until-load.name: Wait until game loaded.

wul-type.name: Wait until load type
wul-type.description: What is shown while waiting for the game to load.

exit-settings.name: Exit Settings
exit-settings.description: Settings related to fading out the video and exiting the animation.

fade-out.name: Fade out video
fade-out.description: Whether the video should fade out when exiting the animation.

fade-out-duration.name: Fade out duration
fade-out-duration.description: Duration of the fade out when exiting the animation, in seconds.
